## Pre-Merge Checklist
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] The project compiles without errors locally (`dotnet build`)
- [ ] I have not committed any sensitive data (passwords, API keys)
- [ ] The GitHub Actions CI pipeline (Status Checks) is expected to pass successfully
